prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: ASR-ASROUTDOORBLACKSTRETCH Product Type: BUNGEE_CORD Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Black Stretch Shock Cord Plastic Ball Utility Cord Camping Tool 100pk Description: Have you ever had a hard time tying an awning or canopy while camping or traveling? Look no further with the ASR Outdoor elastic shock cord with a plastic ball. These stretch cord tools are ideal for tying down tarps over virtually anything, especially if you're hauling a trailer.

Each 6" stretch cord is made of high-quality durable rubber and nylon with a plastic ball so you can count on them rain or shine. The cord is 4mm thick and the ball has a diameter of 1". These stretch cords can be easily attached, fastened or removed from tarps or canopy, making these great tools to keep in your car, truck, boat or RV.

Elastic shock cord is ideal for outdoor survival and home improvement uses, but they are also great for fastening lights and decorations, smart tools and organizing messy wires and cables. Make sure to grab a few of these before your next camping or RV trip. Search Terms: elastic shock cord cord straps stretch rope adjustable stretch cords stretch ties camping accessories camping essentials black stretch cords kayak stretch cord shock cord for camping awning tie downs elastic rope with hooks short shock cords Features: - BLACK ELASTIC SHOCK CORD - The ASR Outdoor stretch shock cord with black ball is a must-have camping accessory. They are ideal for tying down tarps over virtually anything, especially if you're hauling a trailer! - DURABLE CONSTRUCTION - Each 6" stretch cord is made of high-quality durable rubber and nylon with a plastic ball so you can count on them rain or shine. The cord is 4mm thick and the ball has a diameter of 1". - REUSABLE STRETCH CORD - These stretch cords can be easily attached, fastened or removed from tarps or canopy, making these great tools to keep in your car, truck, boat or RV. - VERSATILE TOOL - Elastic shock cord is ideal for outdoor survival and home improvement uses, but they are also great for fastening lights and decorations, smart tools and organizing messy wires and cables. - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: rubber, nylon, plastic; Color: black; Length: 6"; Ball diameter: 1"; Cord thickness: 4mm, weather-resistant === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 100-pk 6" Black Stretch Shock Cord
